prestazioni: Upgrade to a **03H.CJXC** (4.2L V8 FSI) with a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ supercharger kit** (2.9L Eaton TVS2300 blower, 10.5psi boost, forged internals, custom intercooler setup) pushing **650whp/550wtq** on **100-octane fuel** with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full flex-fuel and ignition timing control

Install **APR Carbon Fiber Intake System** with **MST Performance 90mm throttle body** and **034 Motorsport billet fuel rail** paired with **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** injectors (1,050cc/min) and **Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pump** for high-flow fuel delivery

Replace stock **DL501 7-speed S-tronic** with a **ZF 8HP70X 8-speed automatic** (modified by **S-Tronic Solutions**) with **custom valve body tuning** for 150ms shifts, **South Bend Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch**, and **034 Motorsport lightweight flywheel** for reduced rotational mass
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20x10.5 ET32 wheels** (staggered setup) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 275/30/20 tires**

Install **AWE Track Edition exhaust system** (titanium tips, resonated center section, and **custom X-pipe delete** for aggressive V8 bark) paired with **Milltek Sport downpipes** (catless) and **Akrapović carbon fiber rear valance** for heat management

Full **OEM+ interior overhaul** with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts), **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, 350mm), **Audi Sport S4 shift knob** (weighted), and **custom roll cage** (MCS Motorsport bolt-in, 6-point, T45 steel) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**
